generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Critical Alert: Foreign actors are exploiting our reliance on overseas tech for defense systems. Just last month, classified military logistics data was accessed through a backdoor in a popular foreign-made software suite. Our strategic autonomy is at risk when we depend on foreign entities for critical infrastructure. It's time to prioritize domestic solutions to ensure our national security isn't compromised. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
